title: tina neighborhood stagehands
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target. Preserve Tina, her face, wardrobe, product, seated pose, rideshare interior, camera, and window frame. Image 2 supports identity and candy only. Replace only the neighborhood visible beyond the window with a full-scale practical stage set being changed in real time. Teenage stagehands roll ordinary house facades away on visible wheeled tracks while others raise a jewel-colored tropical street, giant mango trees, and a painted sunset backdrop. Ropes, flats, rigging, casters, and backstage gaps remain visible. Tina watches with quiet amusement. Handmade theatrical surrealism, tactile production design, dry social comedy, no glowing magic, no peel mechanism, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
